creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Kennedy from comment #2)

A note to those hitting this bug and using vmrun.sh to spawn a bhyve VM: you may specify an alternative userboot.so loader with the vmrun.sh's -l flag, e.g.,

    ./vmrun.sh [...] -l /usr/obj/usr/home/0mp/freebsd/amd64.amd64/release/dist/base/boot/userboot.so [...]
